_source: LAVCA 2024 + Pitchbook 2025 — manually updated each quarter
_instructions: Update sector_phase when new LAVCA/Pitchbook reports are published. Phase definitions: Early (pre-Series A activity dominates), Growth (Series B-C dominant), Late (Series D+ / pre-IPO activity dominant), Mature (IPO/M&A dominant, new investment slowing).
sources: LAVCA 2024 Latin America Venture Capital Report
